visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a medium shot of a man wearing a grey newsboy cap, glasses, and a black sweatshirt with a 'ROOTS' logo. He is sitting in a well-lit indoor room with a blurred bookshelf background. He gestures enthusiastically with his hands while speaking directly to the camera, holding a small red box. (2) A sharp cut transitions to a close-up of a red CMF Buds Pro 2 charging case on a grey surface. The man's hands enter the frame, demonstrating the physical dial on the corner of the case. He rotates the dial and clicks it, showing its tactile operation next to the open case containing the red earbuds. (3) The camera cuts to a close-up of a smartphone screen held by the man. The screen displays the 'Nothing X' application interface, showing customizable EQ settings and noise cancellation options for the earbuds. His finger taps the screen to demonstrate the software features. (4) A transition occurs to a close-up of a silver/grey smartwatch, the CMF Watch Pro 2. The man holds the watch, showing its circular face and grey silicone strap. He then demonstrates the modular nature of the watch by physically removing the circular bezel ring and showing the interchangeable strap mechanism. (5) The shot focuses on the watch's display, which shows various health tracking interfaces including heart rate monitoring and blood oxygen levels. The man's finger swipes through the menus to show the smoothness of the UI. (6) The final phase shows the watch receiving a simulated call notification from 'LINE'. The screen displays a green accept button and a red decline button, demonstrating the watch's connectivity features while the man continues his energetic presentation.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Subtitle]: 有一個CP值破天際的. (2) [Subtitle]: Nothing的子品牌. (3) [Subtitle]: 叫CMF. (4) [Subtitle]: 在台灣也有開賣. (5) [Subtitle]: 超高性價比的降噪耳機. (6) [Subtitle]: CMF的. (7) [Subtitle]: Buds Pro 2. (8) [Subtitle]: 注意囉！ (9) [Subtitle]: 它是降噪耳機. (10) [Subtitle]: 你看它很漂亮. (11) [Subtitle]: 而且不到2000塊. (12) [Subtitle]: 就可以買到！ (13) [Subtitle]: 續航12小時. (14) [Subtitle]: 最帥的是. (15) [Subtitle]: 它充電盒上面. (16) [Subtitle]: 還有一個可以快速. (17) [Subtitle]: 控制各種功能的旋鈕. (18) [Subtitle]: 自訂EQ語音降噪. (19) [Subtitle]: 還有LDAC. (20) [Subtitle]: 高解析度的認證. (21) [Subtitle]: 當然我們這次也有體驗. (22) [Subtitle]: 超便宜才2690元的. (23) [Subtitle]: CMF Watch Pro 2. (24) [Subtitle]: 的智慧錶. (25) [Subtitle]: 有支援包含心率. (26) [Subtitle]: 血氧運動的監測功能. (27) [Subtitle]: 錶面它其實有. (28) [Subtitle]: 超多的變化. (29) [Subtitle]: 甚至於連錶圈. (30) [Subtitle]: 都可以交換. (31) [Subtitle]: 還可以自行更換. (32) [Subtitle]: 一般的錶帶. (33) [Subtitle]: 最誇張的是. (34) [Subtitle]: 這個手錶的續航. (35) [Subtitle]: 可以誇張. (36) [Subtitle]: 到11天之久！ (37) [Subtitle]: 更讚的是. (38) [Subtitle]: 它也支援. (39) [Subtitle]: 一般的通話外. (40) [Subtitle]: 還可以直接接聽. (41) [Subtitle]: LINE的通話！

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged man with glasses, wearing a grey newsboy cap and a black sweatshirt with a white 'ROOTS' logo.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor room with a bookshelf and warm, soft lighting. The background is slightly out of focus to emphasize the subject.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-arousal male speech in Traditional Chinese, delivered with a fast tempo and friendly tone. An upbeat electronic pop background music track with a strong 128 BPM pulse starts immediately. (2) A 'Pop' sound effect triggers a transition as the speaker introduces the 'CMF' brand. The vocals remain clear and well-enunciated. (3) A distinct 'Ding' sound effect emphasizes the mention of 'Buds Pro 2', accompanied by a shift in the speaker's pitch variability to express excitement. (4) As the speaker details the technical specs like LDAC and EQ, a digital interface 'clicking' sound effect is heard, simulating the operation of the app. (5) A 'Whoosh' transition sound effect marks the shift from audio products to the smartwatch. The background music remains constant in the mix. (6) Toward the end, a synthesized 'Ringtone' sound effect plays to simulate an incoming LINE call, layered over the speaker's final enthusiastic closing remarks.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product 1 Review -> Product 2 Review -> CTA/Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a rapid, high-energy review of CMF by Nothing products (Buds Pro 2 and Watch Pro 2), emphasizing their affordability and feature set for the Taiwanese market.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct presentation of products with pricing, features, and brand name calls.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical short-form social media editing techniques, including high-density variety subtitles and frequent jump cuts to maintain engagement.
